# feat(matching): add authenticity signals to guide scoring

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `d6a82838ca9b` — feat(matching): add authenticity signals to guide scoring

**Body**:

Authenticity signals now differentiate truly local guides from
tourist-oriented guides in the match score:

- review_count: log-scaled bonus (max +0.50) — established guides
- license_verified: +0.20 for verified guides
- bio keywords: +0.10 per authenticity keyword (grew up, born,
  local family, third generation, neighborhood, etc.) max +0.30
- locality: +0.25 when guide covers tourist's destination
  (supports Chiang Mai neighborhood matching)

Formula changed: (norm_dot * 2.5 * auth_multiplier) + 1.2 + bonus
Auth multiplier = 1 + review + verified + bio + locality

The base multiplier reduced from 6.5 to 2.5 to leave room
for the multiplicative auth premium without hitting the 5.0 ceiling.

The /api/matches/{tourist_id} endpoint now accepts an optional
destination query param to enable locality-based scoring.

Note: license_verified column added to guides table (ALTER TABLE).
Seed data has no verified guides yet — this will improve as guides
go through the TAT verification flow.

Fixes: journal/0003-GAP-no-authenticity-signal-in-matching
Fixes: journal/0004-GAP-language-bonus-inverts-local-guide-incentive

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
